body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.52-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** No **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/86469 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** N/A **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Windows 11 Home/Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Preconditions: - Create a $100 expense - Split the expense into $60 and $40 expenses - Send a comment to expense report: "a" - Send a comment "b" to $60 expense - Send a comment "c" to $40 expense 1. Open https://staging.new.expensify.com/ 2. Navigate to report expense 3. Go offline 4. Open $40 splited expense 5. Delete the expense 6. Go online 7. Create a $25 expense ## Expected Result: "b" comment is returned to $60 expense thread and a bubble is displayed in $60 transaction preview ## Actual Result: bubble is not displayed in $60 transaction preview ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/310edb10-8e79-4ab5-a2f2-eb819e419030 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** **Reproducible in staging?:** Needs Reproduction (Unable to reproduce) **Reproducible in production?:** Needs Reproduction **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** **Logs:** https://stackoverflow.com/c/expensify/questions/4856 **Expensify/Expensify Issue URL:** **Issue reported by:** @aimane-chnaif **Slack conversation** (hyperlinked to channel name): [#Convert](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C07HPDRELLD/p1775064451710439) ## Action Performed: Precondition: Have a new workspace with Expensify cards feature enabled. 1. Go to workspace chat 2. Create a draft expense 3. Long press on the report preview and copy link 4. Paste link somewhere (i.e. in self DM) 5. Issue an Expensify virtual card to yourself 6. Go to the chat where link is pasted (i.e. self DM) 7. Tap the link ## Expected Result: There's a system message indicating that the Expensify card was assigned to you. ## Actual Result: The system message doesn't appear when there is a draft expense report. After deleting the expense report, the message appears. ## Workaround: Can the user still use Expensify without this being fixed? Have you informed them of the workaround? ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/329ce69d-0399-40c7-860d-8dd30330b008 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @Krishna2323
